Content:
# MCP on Rails (with optional OAuth)

A Rails application template that integrates the [Model Context Protocol (MCP)](https://github.com/anthropics/model-context-protocol) with Ruby on Rails. During setup, the template asks whether to add OAuth 2.1 protection using [Devise](https://github.com/heartcombo/devise) and [Doorkeeper](https://github.com/doorkeeper-gem/doorkeeper) вЂ” so one template supports both plain MCP and fully authenticated setups.

## Quick Start
Translation:
# MCP on Rails (avec OAuth optionnel)

Un modГЁle dвЂ™application Rails qui intГЁgre le [Model Context Protocol (MCP)](https://github.com/anthropics/model-context-protocol) avec Ruby on Rails. Lors de la configuration, le modГЁle demande sвЂ™il faut ajouter une protection OAuth 2.1 avec [Devise](https://github.com/heartcombo/devise) et [Doorkeeper](https://github.com/doorkeeper-gem/doorkeeper) вЂ” ainsi un seul modГЁle supporte Г  la fois MCP simple et les configurations entiГЁrement authentifiГ©es.

## DГ©marrage rapide

RowTranslations.originContent: A Rails application template that integrates the [Model Context Protocol (MCP)](https://github.com/anthropics/model-context-protocol) with Ruby on Rails. During setup, the template asks whether to add OAuth 2.1 protection using [Devise](https://github.com/heartcombo/devise) and [Doorkeeper](https://github.com/doorkeeper-gem/doorkeeper) вЂ” so one template supports both plain MCP and fully authenticated setups.
RowTranslations.translatedContent: Un modГЁle dвЂ™application Rails qui intГЁgre le [Model Context Protocol (MCP)](https://github.com/anthropics/model-context-protocol) avec Ruby on Rails. Lors de la configuration, le modГЁle demande sвЂ™il faut ajouter une protection OAuth 2.1 avec [Devise](https://github.com/heartcombo/devise) et [Doorkeeper](https://github.com/doorkeeper-gem/doorkeeper) вЂ” ainsi un seul modГЁle supporte Г  la fois MCP simple et les configurations entiГЁrement authentifiГ©es.

Content:
```bash
git clone https://github.com/pstrzalk/mcp-on-rails.git
rails new myapp -m mcp-on-rails/mcp
cd myapp
rails db:migrate
rails server
```
Translation:
```bash
git clone https://github.com/pstrzalk/mcp-on-rails.git
rails new myapp -m mcp-on-rails/mcp
cd myapp
rails db:migrate
rails server
```

Content: The template will prompt:
Translation: Le modГЁle invitera :

Content:
```
Add Devise + Doorkeeper OAuth 2.1 authentication? (y/n)
```
Translation:
```
Add Devise + Doorkeeper OAuth 2.1 authentication? (y/n)
```

Content:
Answer **n** for a plain MCP server or **y** for full OAuth protection.

### Adding the MCP template to an existing Rails application

You may just as easily apply this template to an existing Rails app.
Translation:
RГ©pondez **n** pour un serveur MCP simple ou **y** pour une protection OAuth complГЁte.

### Ajout du modГЁle MCP Г  une application Rails existante

Vous pouvez tout aussi facilement appliquer ce modГЁle Г  une application Rails existante.

RowTranslations.translatedContent: RГ©pondez **n** pour un serveur MCP simple ou **y** pour une protection OAuth complГЁte.

RowTranslations.originContent: Answer **n** for a plain MCP server or **y** for full OAuth protection.

RowTranslations.translatedContent: ### Ajout du modГЁle MCP Г  une application Rails existante

RowTranslations.originContent: ### Adding the MCP template to an existing Rails application

RowTranslations.translatedContent: Vous pouvez tout aussi facilement appliquer ce modГЁle Г  une application Rails existante.

RowTranslations.originContent: You may just as easily apply this template to an existing Rails app.

Content:
```bash
git clone https://github.com/pstrzalk/mcp-on-rails.git
cd your-project/
rails app:template LOCATION=../mcp-on-rails/mcp
```
Translation:
```bash
git clone https://github.com/pstrzalk/mcp-on-rails.git
cd your-project/
rails app:template LOCATION=../mcp-on-rails/mcp
```

Content:
---

## Plain MCP (answer "n")

Creates a Rails app with an open MCP server вЂ” no authentication required.

### What you get

- **`mcp` gem** added to Gemfile
- **`McpController`** at `/mcp` вЂ” inherits `ActionController::API`, handles MCP protocol
- **MCP routes** вЂ” `POST /mcp`, `GET /mcp`
- **Scaffold hook** вЂ” `rails generate scaffold` automatically creates MCP tools
- **Custom tool generator** вЂ” `rails generate mcp_tool ToolName field:type`
- **Custom prompt generator** вЂ” `rails generate mcp_prompt PromptName arg arg:required`
- **`to_mcp_response`** on ApplicationRecord for consistent text formatting
- **`rake mcp:tools`** and **`rake mcp:prompts`** to list all registered tools and prompts (use `mcp:tools:verbose` / `mcp:prompts:verbose` for full details)

### Usage
Translation:
---

## MCP simple (rГ©pondre "n")

CrГ©e une application Rails avec un serveur MCP ouvert вЂ” aucune authentification requise.

### Ce que vous obtenez

- **gem `mcp`** ajoutГ©e au Gemfile
- **`McpController`** Г  `/mcp` вЂ” hГ©rite de `ActionController::API`, gГЁre le protocole MCP
- **Routes MCP** вЂ” `POST /mcp`, `GET /mcp`
- **Hook scaffold** вЂ” `rails generate scaffold` crГ©e automatiquement des outils MCP
- **GГ©nГ©rateur dвЂ™outil personnalisГ©** вЂ” `rails generate mcp_tool NomOutil champ:type`
- **GГ©nГ©rateur de prompt personnalisГ©** вЂ” `rails generate mcp_prompt NomPrompt arg arg:required`
- **`to_mcp_response`** sur ApplicationRecord pour un formatage texte cohГ©rent
- **`rake mcp:tools`** et **`rake mcp:prompts`** pour lister tous les outils et prompts enregistrГ©s (utilisez `mcp:tools:verbose` / `mcp:prompts:verbose` pour les dГ©tails complets)

### Utilisation

Content: Test it:
Translation: Testez-le :

Content:
```bash
# MCP initialize
curl -X POST http://localhost:3000/mcp \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":1,"method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2025-03-26","capabilities":{},"clientInfo":{"name":"test","version":"1.0"}}}'

# List tools
curl -X POST http://localhost:3000/mcp \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":2,"method":"tools/list"}'
```
Translation:
```bash
# MCP initialize
curl -X POST http://localhost:3000/mcp \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":1,"method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2025-03-26","capabilities":{},"clientInfo":{"name":"test","version":"1.0"}}}'

# List tools
curl -X POST http://localhost:3000/mcp \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":2,"method":"tools/list"}'
```

Content:
No authentication needed вЂ” the `/mcp` endpoint is open.

---

## OAuth MCP (answer "y")

Creates a Rails app with an OAuth 2.1-protected MCP server, including PKCE, dynamic client registration, and resource indicator support вЂ” everything needed for MCP's OAuth authorization flow.

### What you get

Everything from plain mode, plus:

- **`devise` + `doorkeeper` gems** added to Gemfile
- **Devise** user authentication (sign-up, sign-in, password reset)
- **Doorkeeper** OAuth 2.1 provider with PKCE enforcement (S256)
- **`McpController`** protected by `doorkeeper_authorize!` with token audience validation (RFC 8707)
- **Dynamic client registration** at `POST /oauth/register` (RFC 7591)
- **Protected resource metadata** at `GET /.well-known/oauth-protected-resource` (RFC 9728)
- **Authorization server metadata** at `GET /.well-known/oauth-authorization-server` (RFC 8414)
- **Resource indicators** вЂ” tokens are scoped to the `/mcp` resource (RFC 8707)

### Usage
Translation:
Aucune authentification requise вЂ” le point de terminaison `/mcp` est ouvert.

---

## OAuth MCP (rГ©pondez "y")

CrГ©e une application Rails avec un serveur MCP protГ©gГ© par OAuth 2.1, incluant PKCE, l'enregistrement dynamique des clients, et le support des indicateurs de ressources вЂ” tout ce qui est nГ©cessaire pour le flux d'autorisation OAuth de MCP.

### Ce que vous obtenez

Tout ce qui est inclus en mode simple, plus :

- **gems `devise` + `doorkeeper`** ajoutГ©s au Gemfile  
- **Devise** pour l'authentification des utilisateurs (inscription, connexion, rГ©initialisation du mot de passe)  
- **Doorkeeper** fournisseur OAuth 2.1 avec application obligatoire de PKCE (S256)  
- **`McpController`** protГ©gГ© par `doorkeeper_authorize!` avec validation de l'audience du token (RFC 8707)  
- **Enregistrement dynamique des clients** via `POST /oauth/register` (RFC 7591)  
- **MГ©tadonnГ©es des ressources protГ©gГ©es** via `GET /.well-known/oauth-protected-resource` (RFC 9728)  
- **MГ©tadonnГ©es du serveur d'autorisation** via `GET /.well-known/oauth-authorization-server` (RFC 8414)  
- **Indicateurs de ressources** вЂ” les tokens sont limitГ©s Г  la ressource `/mcp` (RFC 8707)  

### Utilisation

RowTranslations.originContent: No authentication needed вЂ” the `/mcp` endpoint is open.
RowTranslations.translatedContent: Aucune authentification requise вЂ” le point de terminaison `/mcp` est ouvert.

RowTranslations.originContent: Creates a Rails app with an OAuth 2.1-protected MCP server, including PKCE, dynamic client registration, and resource indicator support вЂ” everything needed for MCP's OAuth authorization flow.
RowTranslations.translatedContent: CrГ©e une application Rails avec un serveur MCP protГ©gГ© par OAuth 2.1, incluant PKCE, l'enregistrement dynamique des clients, et le support des indicateurs de ressources вЂ” tout ce qui est nГ©cessaire pour le flux d'autorisation OAuth de MCP.
Tout ce qui est inclus en mode simple, plus :
- **Devise** pour l'authentification des utilisateurs (inscription, connexion, rГ©initialisation du mot de passe)
- **Doorkeeper** fournisseur OAuth 2.1 avec application obligatoire de PKCE (S256)

RowTranslations.originContent: - **`McpController`** protected by `doorkeeper_authorize!` with token audience validation (RFC 8707)
RowTranslations.translatedContent: - **`McpController`** protГ©gГ© par `doorkeeper_authorize!` avec validation de l'audience du token (RFC 8707)

RowTranslations.originContent: - **Resource indicators** вЂ” tokens are scoped to the `/mcp` resource (RFC 8707)
RowTranslations.translatedContent: - **Indicateurs de ressources** вЂ” les tokens sont limitГ©s Г  la ressource `/mcp` (RFC 8707)

Content:
The `/mcp` endpoint now requires a Bearer token вЂ” unauthenticated requests return 401.

### OAuth flow

The full authorization flow follows MCP's OAuth specification:

1. **Discovery** вЂ” Client fetches `GET /.well-known/oauth-protected-resource` to find the authorization server
2. **Server metadata** вЂ” Client fetches `GET /.well-known/oauth-authorization-server` for endpoints and capabilities
3. **Client registration** вЂ” `POST /oauth/register` with client metadata (RFC 7591)
4. **Authorization** вЂ” `GET /oauth/authorize` with PKCE `code_challenge` (S256) and `resource` parameter
5. **User authentication** вЂ” Devise handles sign-in/sign-up
6. **Token exchange** вЂ” `POST /oauth/token` with `code_verifier` and `resource` parameter
7. **MCP requests** вЂ” `POST /mcp` with `Authorization: Bearer <token>`

### Supported RFCs

| RFC | Description | Endpoint |
|-----|-------------|----------|
| OAuth 2.1 + PKCE | Authorization with Proof Key for Code Exchange (S256) | `/oauth/authorize`, `/oauth/token` |
| RFC 7591 | Dynamic Client Registration | `POST /oauth/register` |
| RFC 8414 | Authorization Server Metadata | `GET /.well-known/oauth-authorization-server` |
| RFC 8707 | Resource Indicators | `resource` parameter in auth + token requests |
| RFC 9728 | Protected Resource Metadata | `GET /.well-known/oauth-protected-resource` |

### Project structure (OAuth mode)
Translation:
Le point de terminaison `/mcp` nГ©cessite dГ©sormais un jeton Bearer вЂ” les requГЄtes non authentifiГ©es retournent 401.

### Flux OAuth

Le flux complet dвЂ™autorisation suit la spГ©cification OAuth de MCP :

1. **DГ©couverte** вЂ” Le client rГ©cupГЁre `GET /.well-known/oauth-protected-resource` pour trouver le serveur dвЂ™autorisation
2. **MГ©tadonnГ©es du serveur** вЂ” Le client rГ©cupГЁre `GET /.well-known/oauth-authorization-server` pour les points de terminaison et capacitГ©s
3. **Enregistrement du client** вЂ” `POST /oauth/register` avec les mГ©tadonnГ©es du client (RFC 7591)
4. **Autorisation** вЂ” `GET /oauth/authorize` avec `code_challenge` PKCE (S256) et paramГЁtre `resource`
5. **Authentification utilisateur** вЂ” Devise gГЁre la connexion/lвЂ™inscription
6. **Г‰change de jeton** вЂ” `POST /oauth/token` avec `code_verifier` et paramГЁtre `resource`
7. **RequГЄtes MCP** вЂ” `POST /mcp` avec `Authorization: Bearer <token>`

### RFC supportГ©s

| RFC | Description | Point de terminaison |
|-----|-------------|---------------------|
| OAuth 2.1 + PKCE | Autorisation avec Proof Key for Code Exchange (S256) | `/oauth/authorize`, `/oauth/token` |
| RFC 7591 | Enregistrement dynamique du client | `POST /oauth/register` |
| RFC 8414 | MГ©tadonnГ©es du serveur dвЂ™autorisation | `GET /.well-known/oauth-authorization-server` |
| RFC 8707 | Indicateurs de ressources | paramГЁtre `resource` dans les requГЄtes dвЂ™auth et de jeton |
| RFC 9728 | MГ©tadonnГ©es de ressource protГ©gГ©e | `GET /.well-known/oauth-protected-resource` |

### Structure du projet (mode OAuth)

RowTranslations.originContent: The `/mcp` endpoint now requires a Bearer token вЂ” unauthenticated requests return 401.
RowTranslations.translatedContent: Le point de terminaison `/mcp` nГ©cessite dГ©sormais un jeton Bearer вЂ” les requГЄtes non authentifiГ©es retournent 401.

RowTranslations.originContent: The full authorization flow follows MCP's OAuth specification:
RowTranslations.translatedContent: Le flux complet dвЂ™autorisation suit la spГ©cification OAuth de MCP :

RowTranslations.originContent: 1. **Discovery** вЂ” Client fetches `GET /.well-known/oauth-protected-resource` to find the authorization server
RowTranslations.translatedContent: 1. **DГ©couverte** вЂ” Le client rГ©cupГЁre `GET /.well-known/oauth-protected-resource` pour trouver le serveur dвЂ™autorisation

RowTranslations.originContent: 2. **Server metadata** вЂ” Client fetches `GET /.well-known/oauth-authorization-server` for endpoints and capabilities
RowTranslations.translatedContent: 2. **MГ©tadonnГ©es du serveur** вЂ” Le client rГ©cupГЁre `GET /.well-known/oauth-authorization-server` pour les points de terminaison et capacitГ©s
3. **Enregistrement du client** вЂ” `POST /oauth/register` avec les mГ©tadonnГ©es du client (RFC 7591)
5. **Authentification utilisateur** вЂ” Devise gГЁre la connexion/lвЂ™inscription
6. **Г‰change de jeton** вЂ” `POST /oauth/token` avec `code_verifier` et paramГЁtre `resource`

RowTranslations.originContent: | OAuth 2.1 + PKCE | Authorization with Proof Key for Code Exchange (S256) | `/oauth/authorize`, `/oauth/token` |
RowTranslations.translatedContent: | OAuth 2.1 + PKCE | Autorisation avec Proof Key for Code Exchange (S256) | `/oauth/authorize`, `/oauth/token` |

RowTranslations.originContent: | RFC 8707 | Resource Indicators | `resource` parameter in auth + token requests |
RowTranslations.translatedContent: | RFC 8707 | Indicateurs de ressources | paramГЁtre `resource` dans les requГЄtes dвЂ™auth et de jeton |

Content:
```
app/
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ controllers/
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ mcp_controller.rb                              # OAuth-protected MCP endpoint
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ oauth_client_registration_controller.rb        # RFC 7591
в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ oauth_authorization_server_metadata_controller.rb  # RFC 8414 + 9728
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ models/
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ user.rb                                        # Devise user with OAuth associations
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ oauth_application.rb
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ oauth_access_token.rb
в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ oauth_access_grant.rb
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ prompts/                                           # MCP prompts (created via generator)
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ tools/                                             # MCP tools (auto-generated per scaffold)
в””в”Ђв”Ђ views/
    в””в”Ђв”Ђ devise/                                        # Customizable auth views

config/
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ initializers/
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ doorkeeper.rb                                  # OAuth + PKCE config
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ devise.rb                                      # User auth config
в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ mcp.rb                                         # MCP tool autoloading
```

Content:
The client must complete the OAuth PKCE flow before making MCP requests вЂ” the `/mcp` endpoint returns 401 without a valid Bearer token.

---

## Common Features (both modes)

### Scaffolding models with MCP tools

Le client doit complГ©ter le flux OAuth PKCE avant d'effectuer des requГЄtes MCP вЂ” le point de terminaison `/mcp` renvoie 401 sans un jeton Bearer valide.

Content:
This creates standard Rails files plus 5 MCP tools in `app/tools/posts/`:
- `show_tool.rb` вЂ” Retrieve a single post by ID
- `index_tool.rb` вЂ” List posts with pagination
- `create_tool.rb` вЂ” Create new posts
- `update_tool.rb` вЂ” Update existing posts
- `delete_tool.rb` вЂ” Delete posts

### Creating custom MCP tools
Translation:
Cela crГ©e des fichiers Rails standard plus 5 outils MCP dans `app/tools/posts/` :
- `show_tool.rb` вЂ” RГ©cupГ©rer un seul post par ID
- `index_tool.rb` вЂ” Lister les posts avec pagination
- `create_tool.rb` вЂ” CrГ©er de nouveaux posts
- `update_tool.rb` вЂ” Mettre Г  jour les posts existants
- `delete_tool.rb` вЂ” Supprimer des posts

### CrГ©ation dвЂ™outils MCP personnalisГ©s

RowTranslations.originContent: rails generate mcp_prompt hotel_finder location:required check_in_date:required adults price_max
RowTranslations.translatedContent: rails generate mcp_prompt hotel_finder location:required check_in_date:required adults price_max

Content:
This creates `app/prompts/hotel_finder.rb` with a prompt class inheriting from `MCP::Prompt`. Arguments are optional by default вЂ” append `:required` to make them required.

Prompts are automatically loaded from `app/prompts/` and registered with the MCP server. Unlike tools, prompts are **not** auto-generated during scaffolding вЂ” they are created explicitly via the generator.

### Listing available tools and prompts
Translation:
Cela crГ©e `app/prompts/hotel_finder.rb` avec une classe de prompt hГ©ritant de `MCP::Prompt`. Les arguments sont facultatifs par dГ©faut вЂ” ajoutez `:required` pour les rendre obligatoires.

Les prompts sont automatiquement chargГ©s depuis `app/prompts/` et enregistrГ©s auprГЁs du serveur MCP. Contrairement aux outils, les prompts ne sont **pas** gГ©nГ©rГ©s automatiquement lors du scaffolding вЂ” ils sont crГ©Г©s explicitement via le gГ©nГ©rateur.

### Liste des outils et prompts disponibles

### Liste des outils et prompts disponibles

Content:
```bash
rake mcp:tools             # compact one-line-per-tool summary
rake mcp:tools:verbose     # full details with schema
rake mcp:prompts           # compact one-line-per-prompt summary
rake mcp:prompts:verbose   # full details with arguments
```

